  FreeBSD doc repository

  Modified files:

  Log:
  - Add <acronym> tags around RSA and DSA words,
  - ensure reader that the ~/.ssh/authorized_files is pure file and not
    directory [1],
  - simplify the last part of para,
  - 8 spaces = tab, while here.
  
  PR: docs/116879 [1]
